note: Michigan churches that are publicly abolitionist (or on the closest-adjacent Reformed / postmillennial network). Curated from the NXR church directory (C:/Users/Dustina/Websites/church-directory) — the abolitionStance='pro_abolition' subset for MI, plus adjacent postmillennial-network churches that have been publicly friendly to the abolition position. The `city` field is the join key with lib/data/cities.ts — the city landing page pulls churches whose `city === city.name`. Add a row when a Michigan church publicly adopts an abolition resolution.
